title: BD10 0TW, Yorkshire Water Services Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/VP3130GZ/V005
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Yorkshire Water Service Limited Installation name: Esholt Sludge Treatment Facility Permit number: EPR/VP3130GZ/V005  "
